policy: Cross-cutting runtime/bridge/workflow modules must be domain-mapped and referenced by declared entrypoints or smoke targets; generic orphan modules fail the convergence gate.

domain_mappings.scripts/team_orchestration_lifecycle.py: BarrenOrder standing team orchestration lifecycle and review gates
domain_mappings.scripts/team_chat_bridge_runtime.py: BarrenOrder team chat bridge runtime scope and active-run policy
domain_mappings.scripts/team_bridge_runtime.py: BarrenOrder standing team bridge runtime planner
